sizing_rule.note: Trade fractional contracts/units based on optimal f calculation to maximize TWR. Convert fractional contracts to tradeable units (e.g., 2.39 contracts = 239 shares for stocks, micro lots for forex). Optimal f value is system-derived from historical results.

source_rule_text: Trade fractional contracts/units based on optimal f to maximize TWR, even if it means trading partial positions (e.g., 2.39 contracts as 239 shares).
